form.label: AI Governance - Security Audit
form.description: Authentication, identity, access-control, and data-movement auditing from provider AI audit feeds. Index scope comes from the ai_governance_index macro.

search.query: `ai_governance_index` | stats count by ai.vendor | rename ai.vendor AS vendor | fields vendor
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" ai.action="login" | stats count
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" ai.action="logout" | stats count
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="admin_change" ai.resource.type="identity" | stats count
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="data_export" ai.action="export" | stats count
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="content_access" ai.resource.type="file" ai.action="create" | stats count
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type | timechart count by event_type
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" ai.action="login" | rename ai.event_type AS method | stats count by method | sort - count

panel.title: Sign-ins by User and Source IP

search.query: `ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" ai.action="login" | rename ai.actor.email AS user, ai.actor.ip AS src_ip | stats count earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by user, src_ip | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - count

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="authentication" ai.action="login" | rename ai.actor.email AS user, ai.actor.ip AS src_ip | stats dc(src_ip) AS distinct_ips values(src_ip) AS ips earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by user | where distinct_ips > 2 | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - distinct_ips

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="admin_change" ai.resource.type="identity" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.org.id AS organization_id | table _time, event_type, user, organization_id | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="admin_change" ai.resource.type IN ("user", "group") | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.org.id AS organization_id | table _time, event_type, user, organization_id | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="admin_change" ai.resource.type="api_key" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.actor.type AS actor_type | table _time, event_type, user, actor_type | sort - _time
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.outcome="failure" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user | stats count by event_type, user | sort - count

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="admin_change" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.resource.type AS resource_type, ai.resource.id AS resource_id, ai.org.id AS organization_id | table _time, event_type, user, resource_type, resource_id, organization_id | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="data_export" ai.action="read" | rename ai.actor.user_agent AS user_agent, ai.actor.ip AS src_ip | stats count dc(src_ip) AS ips values(src_ip) AS ip_list earliest(_time) AS first_seen latest(_time) AS last_seen by user_agent | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - count

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="data_export" ai.action="export" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.org.id AS organization_id | table _time, event_type, user, organization_id | sort - _time

`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.event_category="content_access" ai.resource.type="file" ai.action="create" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type, ai.actor.email AS user, ai.resource.id AS file_id | table _time, event_type, user, file_id | sort - _time
`ai_governance_index` ai.vendor="$provider$" ai.record="activity" ai.actor.type="*scim*" | rename ai.event_type AS event_type | stats count by event_type | sort - count
